usage: reportFreqViolation [-help] [-detailed] [-em_type {avg peak rms all}] [-excInstFile <string>] [-outfile <string>] [-reportFormat <integer>] [-selInstFile <string>] [-slew {min max}] [-sort {name freq minDiff maxDiff minFreq maxFreq}] [-tableScale <float>] [-view <string>]

options.name: -reportFormat
options.description: Specify the format of the report (Def.=0)

options.name: -slew
options.description: Specify the slew used for the report (Def.=min)

options.name: -sort
options.description: {name freq minDiff maxDiff minFreq maxFreq} Specify the sorting type for the report

options.name: -tableScale
options.description: Scale factor for EM table value (Def.=1.0)
